Title: 0xea
Name: Xea
Christie
About: {p}Hyia~!,{Ep}{p}I am the creator of AnodyneWiki.{Ep}{p}I spend a year moderating PsychonautWiki before my contributions got anonymized for calling out the abusive and inproper conduct coming from several moderators and the admin.{Ep}{p}Feel free to chat me up! <3{Ep}

Attributes: {wkp 'transsexual'} ({wkp 'Trans woman' 'male to female'} since May 2023; injecting {sub 'estradiol'} esters weekly)
reoccuring {xeff 'mania' 'manic'} episodes (24 hours to 1 month; {xeff 'appetite suppression'}, {wkp 'delusions of grandeur'})
{roa 'intravenous'} {class 'stimulant' 'stimulant'} {wkp 'addiction'} (since februrary 2024; abstinent 88 days; periods of {xeff 'wakefulness'} up to 6+ days)

prior {xeff 'delusion' 'delusions'} (paranoid, persecutory, {wkp 'delusions of reference'}, {wkp 'somatic symptom disorder' 'somatic'}, {wkp 'thought broadcasting'}, {wkp 'somantic delusion' 'hypochondriasis'}, {wkp 'delusions of grandeur'}, {wkp 'fregoli delusion'}, {wkp 'intermetamorphosis'}, {wkp 'mirrored-self misidentification'}, {wkp 'Cotard%27s syndrome' 'cotard{apos}s syndrome'})

Effects: longer duration especially of amphetamines adrenic effects
Synergy.Note: bicarbonate raising urinary pH decreases amphetamine excretion

TriedSubstances.Name: 2,5-Dimethoxy-4-bromophenethylamine
Notes: "this felt like ages, felt very peaceful not having to think about a <next dose> but just being in a state of wonder which stains itself as long as I want"

TriedSubstances.Name: 2,5-Dimethoxy-4-chloro-N-(2-methoxybenzyl)phenethylamine
Notes: vaporized by soaking 2.4mg of blotters in 10ml 3/1 PG/VG (experience underwhelming requiring subligual dose to push me over the edge)
"this is a weirdly psychotic experience and I absoluely love it X333"
"I vividly recall accidentally drawing a spider and preceding to get horrified of it "

TriedSubstances.Name: 2,5-Dimethoxy-4-iodo-N-(2-methoxybenzyl)phenethylamine
Notes: "dear god!, such sights! serotonin receptors huh?~"

TriedSubstances.Name: Amphetamine
Adverse: {sev 'strong'} {wkp 'addiction'} (+44g consumed; compulsive drug seeking on the street)
{xeff 'peripheral information misinterpretation'} (being observed through window; sudden movements)
{xeff 'autonomous entity'} (being waving from another room. invisibility cloak entities walking around)
{xeff 'auditory hallucination'} (loud breathing noise forcing me to keep my eyes open; 3+ {xeff 'autonomous-voice-communication' 'voices'} drowning out thoughts till {wkp 'unconsciousness'})
{wkp 'bells palsy' 'face dropping'} and {sev 'moderate'} numbing of sensations on the right side of my body

TriedSubstances.Name: Methamphetamine
Effects: {sev 'intense'} {xeff 'focus enhancement'} (often resulting in a state of day long hyper-focus which may or may not be counter-productive)
Adverse: {sev 'strong'} {wkp 'addiction'} (+10g consumed; compulsive drug seeking on the street; psychological breakdown; intense mental dulling and tolerance)
{xeff 'time-distortion?s=time-compression' 'time compression'} (perception of music and other human beings comically speed up)
{xeff 'autonomous entity'} (hallucination of a man sitting in a chair next to me taunting me; pieces of dust manifesting as hallucinations of spider like creatures)
{xeff 'auditory hallucination'} (phantom music playing as if I were wearing headphones)

{xeff 'autonomous voice communication'} (voices of my mother and father screaming at each other for hours about my drug habit; mocking and laughter; police officer screaming in stair-way all night; police radio chatter blaring through the street spelling my name; hallucinations of my partner making fun of me to her friends and threatening to seriously hurt me)

Effects: {sev 'intense'} {xeff 'focus enhancement'} (often resulting in a state of day long hyper-focus which may or may not be counter-productive)
Adverse: {sev 'strong'} {wkp 'addiction'} (+10g consumed; compulsive drug seeking on the street; psychological breakdown; intense mental dulling and tolerance)
{xeff 'time-distortion?s=time-compression' 'time compression'} (perception of music and other human beings comically speed up)

TriedSubstances.Name: Orthophedrone

TriedSubstances.Name: Metaphedrone
Effects: {sev 'intense'} {wkp 'addiction'} (made me feel as if this feeling would be the purpose of the rest of my life; +60g consumed; emptied out savings)

TriedSubstances.Name: Dimethyltryptamine

~20mg vaporized produced feelings of shooting through space while completely clear in my head, very clean beautiful visuals
~25mg vaporized produced feelings of being torn out of my body and lost in space

TriedSubstances.Name: Oxitriptan
Effects: subjective improvement in wellbeing after {sub '3,4-methylenedioxymethampheamine' 'MDMA'} use

TriedSubstances.Name: Sumatriptan

burning sensation in my head immediately

TriedSubstances.Name: Lysergic acid diethylamide

vulnerable animalistic perception of organic living beings
enabled understanding repressed part of myself
